title: Cobbled Deepslate to Cobblestone
description: Cobbled deepslate can now turn into cobblestone along with a few other features regarding stonecutters.
body:
## Cobbled Deepslate to Cobblestone
_**⚠️NEEDS UPDATING ⚠️**_

When placing Cobbled Deepslate into a grindstone, you are now given the option to turn it into cobbleston.       
The same applies to **Deepslate** and **stone**

**Polymorph is a Required for a few features** one of which is the option to smelt stone to deepslate and cobblestone to cobbled deepslate

_This is a datapack and is placed in the datapack folder of a world_

### **_This datapack WILL NOT work on Minecraft editions BELOW 1.17 as deepslate hasn't been added yet :)_**

**IF** there is any **Feedback**, **Bugs** or **Questions** **DM 4_Square** on **Discord** OR make a **comment** on the **CurseForge** page
